name: public acquisition
detail: Cloned pep_core@570410b and pep_doc@146d799 from public GitLab remotes.

name: LLR pedigree present
detail: bigtest.obsllr exists=True and peputil/bigtest workflow references it directly=True.

name: arm64 REAL*10 support
detail: Current gfortran rejects both REAL*10 declarations and _10 literals in a trivial probe.

name: arm64 long-double flag
detail: Current gfortran rejects -m128bit-long-double, while pep_core/verify and peputil makefiles require that flag.

name: minimal object build
detail: make -C pep -f makefile a1ut1.o fails immediately at the first REAL*10 source, before any LLR bigtest run can start.

name: x86 legacy toolchain on host
detail: Rosetta available=True, but dedicated /usr/local/bin gfortran paths found=0.

name: porting risk
detail: REAL*10 appears in 166 files and 207 source hits, so rewriting kinds locally would become a porting project, not a bounded hand-off.
